sections.paragraph:
- Original: Ἰουλία

- Transliteration: Ioulia

- Phonetic: ee-oo-lee'-ah

- Definition: Julia = "soft haired"

1. a Christian woman

- Origin: feminine of the same as G2457

- TDNT entry: None

- Part(s) of speech: Noun Feminine

- Strong's: Feminine of the same as G2457; Julia a Christian woman: - Julia.
